fix_summary: The fix correctly changes `max_price` from an inverted lower-bound check to an inclusive upper-bound check in `search_flights`, and adds a regression test covering below/at/above-threshold prices. The route handler did not need changes and automated tests passed.
approval_reasons: The service-layer comparison now matches the acceptance criteria (`price <= max_price`).
The regression test directly covers the max_price boundary behavior and confirms the corrected filter.
